caption: A person wearing a pink tank top and grey shorts is practicing a basketball layup in an indoor gymnasium. The setting includes a polished wooden court, a blue padded wall, and grey bleachers. A basketball hoop with a white backboard is mounted on the wall. In the initial sequence, the person jumps high into the air, extending their right arm to reach toward the rim. As the action progresses, they reach the peak of their jump and begin to descend. By the final stages, the person lands back on the court, returning to a standing position with their feet on the floor. Throughout the motion, a red fire extinguisher and a small trash can remain stationary against the blue wall in the background. No text or logos are legible in the scene.
